name: Compton Gamma Ray Observatory
tagline: One of NASA's four Great Observatories
description: One of NASA’s four "Great Observatories" alongside Hubble, Chandra, and Spitzer. In orbit 1991–2000, mapped the gamma-ray sky and discovered that gamma-ray bursts come from cosmological distances rather than nearby sources.
best_known_for: One of NASA's four Great Observatories
